## SAF1.1. Effectiveness of Safety Management (EoSM) (KPI#1)

In 2025, HungaroControl achieved the planned maturity levels set out in its performance plan for all five components of the EoSM.

As described in the monitoring report, Hungary notes that HungaroControl runs a five-year safety development plan, and the activities outlined within support achieving target levels across all components by the end of the reference period.
